brand.description: Secondary brand of the card. For example: **plastix**, **hmclub**.

cvc.description: The card verification code. Only collect raw card data if you are [fully PCI compliant](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/pci-dss-compliance-guide).

expiryMonth.description: The card expiry month. Only collect raw card data if you are [fully PCI compliant](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/pci-dss-compliance-guide).

expiryYear.description: The card expiry year. Only collect raw card data if you are [fully PCI compliant](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/pci-dss-compliance-guide).

fundingSource.description: The funding source that should be used when multiple sources are available. For Brazilian combo cards, by default the funding source is credit. To use debit, set this value to **debit**.

holderName.description: The name of the card holder.

networkPaymentReference.description: The network token reference. This is the [`networkTxReference`](https://docs.adyen.com/api-explorer/#/CheckoutService/latest/post/payments__resParam_additionalData-ResponseAdditionalDataCommon-networkTxReference) from the response to the first payment.

number.description: The card number. Only collect raw card data if you are [fully PCI compliant](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/pci-dss-compliance-guide).

recurringDetailReference.description: This is the `recurringDetailReference` returned in the response when you created the token.

shopperNotificationReference.description: The `shopperNotificationReference` returned in the response when you requested to notify the shopper. Used only for recurring payments in India.

storedPaymentMethodId.description: This is the `recurringDetailReference` returned in the response when you created the token.

threeDS2SdkVersion.description: Required for mobile integrations. Version of the 3D Secure 2 mobile SDK.

type.description: Default payment method details. Common for scheme payment methods, and for simple payment method details.
